---
title: "Benchmarks"
listing:
  type: grid
  sort-ui: false
  sort:
    - "date desc"
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, author]
  categories: true
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  page-size: 6
  contents:
    - "./*.qmd"
    - "!./index.qmd"
toc: false
toc-location: body
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
Explore benchmarks used to evaluate and compare ML models and AI-powered tools. Understanding how benchmarks are constructed — and their limitations — is critical for interpreting leaderboard results and making informed decisions about model selection.

#### Also on Nexus
- [**Data**: INQUIRE](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Toolbox/Data/INQUIRE.html): A text-to-image retrieval benchmark with 250 expert-level ecological queries over 5M iNaturalist images.
- [**Talk**: LabelBench](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Applications/Videos/Other/2024-02-23_LabelBench_Jifan-Zhang.html): A framework for benchmarking label-efficient learning combining active learning, semi-supervised learning, and transfer learning.
